programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares (US)
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Norwalk, Ohio, in America's farming heartland, for the first of two visits to the Mill Street Bistro. There he encounters Joe Nagy, one of the most pretentious deluded restaurant owners he has ever met.

programme.title: Encanto
programme.desc: An extraordinary family, the Madrigals, live hidden in the mountains of Colombia, in a magical house called an Encanto. The magic of the Encanto has blessed every child in the family with a unique gift - every child except one, Mirabel.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry and Alan Davies are joined by Danny Baker, Jo Brand and Howard Goodall to discuss some Quite Interesting topics beginning with the letter A.

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: On this episode the guys ask, can a car stereo destroy a car with just sound? Adam and Jamie pump up the bass to find out. And the Tory, Kari, and Grant hit the road to take on two tall tales from down under.
